title: CMBT (Combat)
description: Combat datapack that turns existing tools into new weapons.
body:
# CMBT

CMBT is a combat datapack that turns existing tools into new weapons.

Below are all of the updates:

## Weapons
### Hoe
Fast attack speed and long reach
Gives you a small speed and attack speed bost whenever you land a hit.
New enchants.


### Shovel
Slow attack speed and reach but very high damage and knockback.
New enchants.


### Pickaxe
Has various effects depending on if you have specific items in your offhand.
New enchants.
<details>
<summary>Effect items</summary>
  
**Ender Pearl**
Teleports you foward when you land a hit.


**Breeze Rod**
Shoots a wind charge downwards when you land a hit.


**Rabbits Foot**
Gives you a burst of speed and jump boost when you land a hit.


**Nether Wart**
Heals you for 1/2 a heart when you land a hit.


**Echo Shard**
Damages you but gives you strength 3 for 2 seconds when you land a hit.


**Amethyst Shard**
Burys all enities in a small radius from the waist down when you land a hit.


**Firework Rocket**
Causes a small explosion on all enities in a small radius when you land a hit.
</details>


### Fishing Rod
After you have hooked and opponent for a few seconds a splash will appear and they will fly up after you reel them in.


### Bone
Very short reach.
Mid Damage 
Little knockback.
New enchants.

### Shield
Short reach.
Mid damage.
High knockback.
New enchants.



## Enchantments
### Bash 
Acts as sharpness for shovel, hoe, pickaxe, bone and shield.

### Blast 
Creates an explosion when you land a hit with shovel.

### Infect
Gives infested effect when you land a hit with hoe.

### Reap
Gives you regeneration and the victim poison when you land a hit with bone.

### Stun
Gives slowness to victim when you land a hit with shovel or shield.

### Swing
Gives more attack speed for each level for pickaxe.

### Curse of Flesh
Gives you hunger when you land a hit with any tool.

## Magic
CMBT has a combat/movement focused magic system, it works by holding a book it your offhand, a magic item in you mainhand and snaking to activate the effect
Magic items:

### Amethyst shard
Drops potion in front of you that gives poison and slowness
Consumes 2 books

### Eye of ender
Teleports you foward a few blocks
Consumes 1 book

### Feather
Makes you float upwards
Consumes 1 book

### Fire charge
Spawns a punchable fireball in front of you
Consumes 3 books

### Glowstone dust
Gives you absorbtion and instant health
Consumes 4 books

### Gunpowder
Places a block underneath your feet 
Consumes 4 books




## Datapack By Amo 
![Amo101 minecraft skin head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdffeb44b758db9b61b32b3c81414c9017aace15.png)
